sections.paragraph:
verb לחדש

to renew, renovate; rejuvenate; innovate

verb חודש

be renewed, renovated; revived; rejuvenated

verb להתחדש

be renewed; restored; renovated

verb לחדש (>>חידש)

to renew, renovate; rejuvenate; innovate

adjective

new, novel, recent, fresh, late, unused, unaccustomed, mint, neoteric, newfangled, nouveau
